## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing impact.

## Security

- [ ] I checked the impact on authentication, VPN routing, and secrets handling.
- [ ] The CodeQL security scan passes.
- [ ] I reviewed shell scripts and Dockerfiles for unsafe command usage.

## Review

- [ ] I requested a code review.
- [ ] I addressed feedback from previous reviews.
- [ ] I added screenshots or runtime notes if the dashboard or connection flow changed.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks.
- [ ] I updated the documentation if behavior changed.
